author: SantiMod
content:
If the Star Atlas marketplace is not working for you, please follow these instructions:

Go to this link: https://dex.raydium.io/#/market/CWn74XJsh98zWVYWtzqn1dGuz96KFxb18pYQQfECuCzA

Click on the + symbol you have on the top left of your screen and add this:
Market ID: CWn74XJsh98zWVYWtzqn1dGuz96KFxb18pYQQfECuCzA
Market Label: PF4/USDC
Base Label: PF4
